judgment.summary: Seagate exhibits exceptional growth and profitability metrics, though its valuation is stretched and leverage is high.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 16.8%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth 120.0% YoY — demonstrating significant acceleration.
Return on equity 1788.0% — exceptionally high shareholder returns.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target of $814.95.
negatives: Trailing P/E 75.50 and Price/Sales 16.16 — valuation appears very high.
Debt/Equity 381.55 — significant leverage on the balance sheet.
Beta 2.01 — stock exhibits high volatility relative to the market.

news.paragraph: Jim Cramer recently expressed skepticism about the valuation of both Seagate Technology (STX) and Western Digital, calling them "too pricey" and "too rich." This commentary comes as STX's stock trades at a significant premium, despite strong reported growth and a positive analyst consensus. Traders should consider whether this high-profile negative sentiment could weigh on the stock, especially given its elevated valuation multiples.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Western Digital: “That Seems Too Rich to Me”
